Interface IRasterWorkspace2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control an improved raster workspace.

[Guid("9FD9A370-1D1B-11D4-ABDA-0008C73FCA1C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterWorkspace2

Methods

CanCopy()

Indicates if this dataset can be copied.

bool CanCopy()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Copy(string, IWorkspace) 

IDataset Copy(string copyName, IWorkspace copyWorkspace)

Parameters

copyName string
copyWorkspace IWorkspace

Returns

IDataset

CreateRasterDataset(string, string, IPoint, int, int, double, double, int, rstPixelType, ISpatialReference, bool) 

IRasterDataset CreateRasterDataset(string Name, string Format, IPoint Origin, int columnCount, int RowCount, double cellSizeX, double cellSizeY, int numBands, rstPixelType PixelType, ISpatialReference SpatialReference, bool Permanent = true)

Parameters

Name string
Format string
Origin IPoint
columnCount int
RowCount int
cellSizeX double
cellSizeY double
numBands int
PixelType rstPixelType
SpatialReference ISpatialReference
Permanent bool

Returns

IRasterDataset

IsWorkspace(string)

Indicates if the file path specified is a raster workspace.

bool IsWorkspace(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

OpenRasterDataset(string)

Opens a RasterDataset in the workspace given its name.
